How parents are paired: Pollinators move pollen between any two co-flowering plants
What it produces: Compatibility = compatible-pair fraction x visitation rate; most pollen wasted at low compatible-pair fraction

How parents are paired: Researchers/managers select parent pairs using genotype data
What it produces: Compatibility approaches the upper bound set by current allele richness k

How parents are paired: As above plus introducing parents from another bottleneck lineage
What it produces: Compatibility ceiling itself rises as k grows
